name: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Deuda Total Fondo De Inversion
summary: MBI Administradora General De Fondo - MBI Deuda Total Fondo De Inversion invests in a broad range of debt instruments. MBI Administradora General De Fondo manages the fund. The fund's objective is to generate income and capital appreciation through investments in a diversified portfolio of debt securities across various sectors and geographies.
